description: DB-backed: getClientPulse happy path — seeded client with open+overdue tickets, draft invoice, delivered stock unit, contacts, locations → correct counts, refs and attention flags
DB-backed: aging math — finalized invoices with due dates across buckets, one invoice_payments row and one credit_applied → outstanding lands in correct buckets and sums
note: green — buckets verified vs completed payment + credit_applied

description: DB-backed: pulse RBAC — user without billing:read gets no money section and no money attention flags; user without inventory:read gets no installBase and no SO/RMA flags
DB-backed: client-waiting flag appears only when the latest comment on an open ticket has author_type='client'; internal-latest and closed tickets emit nothing
note: green after fixing seed (comments has is_system_generated, not is_initial_description)

description: DB-backed: listClientTimeline merges ≥4 source types (ticket, invoice, unit delivered, interaction, quote activity) in strict descending occurred_at order with correct refs
DB-backed: timeline cursor pagination — page size limit respected, second page continues without overlap or gaps; type filter returns only requested types
DB-backed: timeline RBAC — user without billing:read receives no invoice events; without inventory:read no unit/SO/RMA events
Browser smoke (manual, EE dev stack): Emerald City renders live command center — attention flags real, cards match DB, timeline shows this week's real events, no placeholder content
note: verified live on Emerald City: flags ($15,753 drafts / #TIC1003 3d overdue / RMA 50d), aging bars match seeded 50/100/75, timeline all-real, honest empty states (record card, CSAT)

description: Browser smoke (manual): ?tab=equipment deep link opens Equipment focus view; closing it cleans URL; quickView drawer from another screen still renders legacy compact layout
note: deep link ?tab=equipment verified live (incl. async-registry race fix); close cleans URL; quickView legacy path verified by code branch (quickView||isInDrawer -> CustomTabs), not browser-exercised
